hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams turn entity, UBO, and corporate risk signals into structured cases with audit-ready evidence and automated rule-driven workflows.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow

trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Case creation delays from disconnected risk signals
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to consolidate entity, UBO and corporate risk data that remains siloed across multiple providers. This fragmentation slows case initiation, complicates audit evidence gathering and weakens operational control over entity-related compliance workflows.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY aggregates entity, UBO and corporate risk data from multiple providers into unified case workflows that document decisions and preserve audit evidence for faster, clearer compliance operations.
workflow_title: From entity risk signals to cases
workflow_description: SFTY captures entity and UBO risk inputs then routes reviews, opens cases, records decisions and preserves evidence across corporate compliance workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented outputs. Structured case creation
why_sfty_description: SFTY turns multiple provider signals into connected cases with clear decisions, preserved evidence, and aligned workflows for streamlined entity risk management and audit readiness.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASP operations requiring controlled case creation from entity risk signals combined with audit evidence and deployment standards suited for bank and partner due diligence.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence supports entity case reviews

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for entity case creation?
faq_1_answer: SFTY structures entity, UBO and corporate risk signals into cases, enabling VASPs to manage compliance workflows across multiple providers with consistent decision records and regulatory alignment.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY automate entity risk workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY applies internal rules to provider outputs, routes reviews, opens cases, records decisions and escalates high-risk entities automatically within a controlled workflow.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve case audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and linked evidence packages to support audit-ready records that show compliance decisions for regulatory and internal reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with our compliance stack?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects existing KYC, KYB, KYT and screening providers into one operational layer without disrupting your current compliance infrastructure.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above your providers, orchestrating their outputs into structured workflows rather than replacing underlying compliance tools.
final_title: Turn entity risk signals into structured cases
final_description: Review how SFTY creates audit-ready entity and UBO cases from provider outputs with automated rule-driven workflows.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
